label: Planet Name
description: Planet name most commonly used in the literature.

label: Host Name
description: Stellar name most commonly used in the literature.

label: Number of Stars
description: Number of gravitationally bound stars in the planetary system.

label: Number of Planets
description: Number of confirmed planets in the planetary system.

label: Discovery Method
description: Method by which the planet was first identified (e.g. Transit, Radial Velocity).

label: Discovery Year
description: Year the planet was discovered.

label: Discovery Facility
description: Name of the facility making the discovery observations.

label: Orbital Period
description: Time the planet takes to complete one orbit around its host (system).

label: Orbit Semi-Major Axis
description: Longest radius of the elliptic orbit; for microlensing/imaging detections, the projected sky-plane separation.

label: Eccentricity
description: Amount by which the orbit deviates from a perfect circle (0 = circular).

label: Inclination
description: Angle of the orbit plane relative to the plane perpendicular to Earth's line of sight.

label: Planet Radius
description: Planet radius measured in units of Earth's radius.

label: Planet Radius
description: Planet radius measured in units of Jupiter's radius.

label: Planet Mass or Mass*sin(i)
description: Best mass estimate (Mass, M*sin(i)/sin(i), or M*sin(i)) in Earth masses.

label: Planet Mass or Mass*sin(i)
description: Best mass estimate (Mass, M*sin(i)/sin(i), or M*sin(i)) in Jupiter masses.

label: Planet Density
description: Planet mass per unit volume.

label: Equilibrium Temperature
description: Equilibrium temperature assuming a black-body planet heated by its host star.

label: Insolation Flux
description: Stellar flux at the planet relative to Earth's solar flux.

label: Spectral Type
description: Morgan-Keenan spectral classification of the host star.

label: Stellar Effective Temperature
description: Black-body temperature emitting the same total electromagnetic radiation as the star.

label: Stellar Radius
description: Stellar radius in units of the Sun's radius.

label: Stellar Mass
description: Stellar mass in units of the Sun's mass.

label: Stellar Metallicity
description: Metal content of the stellar photosphere relative to hydrogen.

label: Stellar Surface Gravity
description: Gravitational acceleration at the stellar surface (log10).

label: Stellar Age
description: Age of the host star in billions of years.

label: Right Ascension
description: Right ascension of the planetary system in decimal degrees.

label: Declination
description: Declination of the planetary system in decimal degrees.

label: Distance
description: Distance to the planetary system in parsecs.
